description: UX and UI Polish based on visual audit findings.

userStories.title: Improve mobile viewport header layout
userStories.description: As a mobile user, the header links (Writing, SEO) are cramped near the main site title, causing a cluttered header space.
acceptanceCriteria: Header spacing is adjusted on screens under 768px to prevent overlapping and clustering.
Implement a mobile hamburger menu if spacing cannot be optimized in a single row.
Check build passes
Verify functionally in browser

userStories.title: Provide distinct interactive states for cards
userStories.description: As a user, hover effects on tool cards are too subtle, making it less clear that they are interactive elements.
acceptanceCriteria: Increase hover shadow depth/elevation for tool cards.
Add subtle upward translation (e.g. translateY(-2px)) with transition on hover for cards.
Check build passes
Verify functionally in browser

userStories.title: Refine typography and heading weights
userStories.description: As a user, the typography feels a bit generic. Improving font families, headings weights, and line heights will make the site read better.
acceptanceCriteria: Import and apply a modern sans-serif font (e.g., Inter, Roboto).
Adjust heading (h1, h2, h3) font-weights and line-heights for better readability.
Check build passes
Verify functionally in browser

userStories.title: Fix accessibility text contrast
userStories.description: As an accessible user, secondary text elements (like '10th-12th grade' in the readability tool) do not contrast highly enough against their backgrounds.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify and fix low contrast text colors, particularly in the Readability Checker.
Text and component colors meet WCAG AA contrast ratios.
Check build passes
Verify functionally in browser

userStories.title: Polish Dark Mode Toggle
userStories.description: As a user, the current dark mode toggle relies on simple emoji (🌙), which breaks the sophisticated visual language.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace text-emoji based toggle with SVG icons representing sun/moon or light/dark.
Match the toggle styling to the rest of the polished UI.
Check build passes
Verify functionally in browser
